standard_instruction: Segment seg_1b_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 first performs reconnaissance on area_A as task t1_recon_area_a. Then fleet_1 performs strike on target_A as task t2_strike_target_a. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_area_a to t2_strike_target_a. Add a deadline of 10.0 for t2_strike_target_a.

Segment seg_1b_002 uses actors fleet_1 and fleet_2. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_A as t1_fleet1_recon_area_a. fleet_2 performs strike on target_B as t2_fleet2_strike_target_b. Add a parallel dependency from t1_fleet1_recon_area_a to t2_fleet2_strike_target_b.

Segment seg_1b_003 uses actors fleet_1 and fleet_2. fleet_1 performs rendezvous at point_A as t1_fleet1_rendezvous. fleet_2 performs rendezvous at point_A as t2_fleet2_rendezvous. Add a sync dependency between t1_fleet1_rendezvous and t2_fleet2_rendezvous with sync_tolerance 0.5.

Segment seg_1b_004 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_2 and fleet_3. Add three rendezvous tasks at point_A: t1_fleet1_ready for fleet_1, t2_fleet2_ready for fleet_2 and t3_fleet3_ready for fleet_3. Add one group_sync constraint over these three task ids with tolerance 0.5, mode start and source_label group_sync_ready_start.

Segment seg_1b_005 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on target_A as t1_recon_target_a. After condition target_A_confirmed, fleet_1 performs strike on target_A as t2_strike_target_a. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon_target_a to t2_strike_target_a with condition target_A_confirmed.

Segment seg_1b_006 uses actor fleet_1. Create five strike tasks for fleet_1: t1_strike_a on target_A, t2_strike_b on target_B, t3_strike_c on target_C, t4_strike_d on target_D and t5_strike_e on target_E. Add sequence dependencies from t1_strike_a to t2_strike_b, t2_strike_b to t3_strike_c, t3_strike_c to t4_strike_d and t4_strike_d to t5_strike_e.

Segment seg_1b_007 uses actor fleet_3. fleet_3 flies from initial to hq_mark6 as t1_fly_to_mark6. Then fleet_3 jams hq_mark6 as t2_jam_mark6. Then fleet_3 flies from hq_mark6 to hq_mark7 as t3_fly_to_mark7. Add sequence dependencies from t1_fly_to_mark6 to t2_jam_mark6 and from t2_jam_mark6 to t3_fly_to_mark7. Add a deadline of 30.0 for t3_fly_to_mark7. Add physical feasibility for t1_fly_to_mark6 with distance 30.0 km and speed 70.0 km/h, and for t3_fly_to_mark7 with distance 10.0 km and speed 70.0 km/h.

Segment seg_1b_008 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 tracks area_C as task t1_track_area_c. Then fleet_1 strikes target_C as task t2_strike_target_c. Add a sequence dependency from t1_track_area_c to t2_strike_target_c. Add a deadline of 12.0 for t2_strike_target_c.

Segment seg_1b_009 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_2 and fleet_3. Each actor performs a rendezvous at point_D: t1_fleet1_ready_d for fleet_1, t2_fleet2_ready_d for fleet_2 and t3_fleet3_ready_d for fleet_3. Add a deadline of 6.0 for each of the three tasks. Add one group_sync constraint over the three task ids with tolerance 0.5, mode start and source_label group_sync_ready_d_start.

Segment seg_1b_010 uses actor fleet_9. fleet_9 performs reconnaissance on target_D as t1_recon_target_d. After condition target_D_confirmed, fleet_9 performs strike on target_D as t2_strike_target_d. Then fleet_9 performs strike on target_E as t3_strike_target_e. Then fleet_9 performs strike on target_F as t4_strike_target_f. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon_target_d to t2_strike_target_d with condition target_D_confirmed, a sequence dependency from t2_strike_target_d to t3_strike_target_e, and a sequence dependency from t3_strike_target_e to t4_strike_target_f.

Segment seg_1b_011 uses actor fleet_3. fleet_3 flies from hq_1 to hq_2 as t1_fly_to_hq2. Then fleet_3 performs reconnaissance on hq_2 as t2_recon_hq2. Add a sequence dependency from t1_fly_to_hq2 to t2_recon_hq2. Add physical feasibility for t1_fly_to_hq2 with distance 10.0 km, speed 70.0 km/h and time_unit_minutes 1.0.

Segment seg_1b_012 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 performs standby at area_G as t1_fleet4_standby. Then fleet_4 flies to area_H as t2_fleet4_fly_area_h. Neither task requires a capability. Add a sequence dependency from t1_fleet4_standby to t2_fleet4_fly_area_h.
Segment seg_std_single_001 uses actor fleet_5. fleet_5 performs reconnaissance on area_alpha as task t1_recon_alpha.
Segment seg_std_single_002 uses actor fleet_2. fleet_2 performs strike on target_alpha as task t1_strike_alpha.
Segment seg_std_single_003 uses actor fleet_3. fleet_3 performs jam on site_alpha as task t1_jam_alpha.
Segment seg_std_single_004 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs track on convoy_alpha as task t1_track_alpha.
Segment seg_std_single_005 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 performs standby at point_alpha as task t1_standby_alpha.

Segment seg_std_seq2_001 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 first performs reconnaissance on area_beta as task t1_recon_beta. Then fleet_4 performs strike on target_beta as task t2_strike_beta. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_beta to t2_strike_beta.

Segment seg_std_seq2_002 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 first performs reconnaissance on area_gamma as task t1_recon_gamma. Then fleet_8 performs strike on target_gamma as task t2_strike_gamma. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_gamma to t2_strike_gamma.

Segment seg_std_seq2_003 uses actor fleet_12. fleet_12 first performs fly_to on hq_delta as task t1_flyto_delta. Then fleet_12 performs jam on hq_delta as task t2_jam_delta. Add a sequence dependency from t1_flyto_delta to t2_jam_delta.

Segment seg_std_seq2_004 uses actor fleet_9. fleet_9 first performs reconnaissance on area_epsilon as task t1_recon_epsilon. Then fleet_9 performs strike on target_epsilon as task t2_strike_epsilon. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_epsilon to t2_strike_epsilon.

Segment seg_std_seq2_005 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 first performs reconnaissance on area_zeta as task t1_recon_zeta. Then fleet_1 performs strike on target_zeta as task t2_strike_zeta. Add a sequence dependency from t1_recon_zeta to t2_strike_zeta. Add a deadline of 12.0 for t2_strike_zeta.

Segment seg_std_seq3_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_a1 as t1_recon, then strike on target_a1 as t2_strike, then standby at point_a1 as t3_standby. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike and t2_strike->t3_standby.

Segment seg_std_seq3_002 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 performs reconnaissance on area_a2 as t1_recon, then strike on target_a2 as t2_strike, then strike on target_b2 as t3_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike and t2_strike->t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_003 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_a3 as t1_recon, strike on target_a3 as t2_strike, reconnaissance on area_b3 as t3_recon, then strike on target_b3 as t4_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike, t2_strike->t3_recon, t3_recon->t4_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_004 uses actor fleet_12. fleet_12 performs fly_to on hq_a4 as t1_flyto, jam on hq_a4 as t2_jam, then reconnaissance on hq_a4 as t3_recon. Add sequence dependencies t1_flyto->t2_jam and t2_jam->t3_recon.

Segment seg_std_seq3_005 uses actor fleet_2. fleet_2 performs strike on target_a5 as t1_strike, strike on target_b5 as t2_strike, then strike on target_c5 as t3_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_strike->t2_strike and t2_strike->t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_006 uses actor fleet_6. fleet_6 performs strike on target_a6 as t1, strike on target_b6 as t2, strike on target_c6 as t3, then strike on target_d6 as t4. Add sequence dependencies t1->t2, t2->t3, t3->t4.

Segment seg_std_seq3_007 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_a7 as t1_recon, strike on target_a7 as t2_strike, strike on target_b7 as t3_strike, then strike on target_c7 as t4_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_strike, t2_strike->t3_strike, t3_strike->t4_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_008 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_a8 as t1_recon, track on convoy_a8 as t2_track, strike on target_a8 as t3_strike, then strike on target_b8 as t4_strike. Add sequence dependencies t1_recon->t2_track, t2_track->t3_strike, t3_strike->t4_strike.

Segment seg_std_seq3_009 uses actor fleet_12. fleet_12 performs reconnaissance on area_a9 as t1_recon, jam on site_a9 as t2_jam, strike on target_a9 as t3_strike, reconnaissance on area_b9 as t4_recon, then strike on target_b9 as t5_strike. Chain them with sequence dependencies t1->t2->t3->t4->t5.

Segment seg_std_parallel_001 uses actors fleet_1 and fleet_2. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_p1 as t1_recon. fleet_2 performs strike on target_p1 as t2_strike. Add a parallel dependency between t1_recon and t2_strike.

Segment seg_std_parallel_002 uses actors fleet_4 and fleet_6. fleet_4 performs reconnaissance on area_p2 as t1_recon. fleet_6 performs strike on target_p2 as t2_strike. Add a parallel dependency between t1_recon and t2_strike.

Segment seg_std_parallel_003 uses actors fleet_3 and fleet_8. fleet_3 performs jam on site_p3 as t1_jam. fleet_8 performs strike on target_p3 as t2_strike. Add a parallel dependency between t1_jam and t2_strike.

Segment seg_std_parallel_004 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_2 and fleet_3. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_p4 as t1_recon. fleet_2 performs strike on target_p4 as t2_strike. fleet_3 performs jam on site_p4 as t3_jam. Add parallel dependencies between t1_recon and t2_strike, and between t2_strike and t3_jam.

Segment seg_std_parallel_005 uses actors fleet_5 and fleet_10. fleet_5 performs reconnaissance on area_p5 as t1_recon. fleet_10 performs strike on target_p5 as t2_strike. Add a parallel dependency between t1_recon and t2_strike.

Segment seg_std_sync_001 uses actors fleet_1 and fleet_4. fleet_1 performs rendezvous at point_s1 as t1_rdv. fleet_4 performs rendezvous at point_s1 as t2_rdv. Synchronize t1_rdv and t2_rdv within a tolerance of 0.5.

Segment seg_std_groupsync_002 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_2 and fleet_8. Each performs rendezvous at point_s2 (tasks t1_rdv, t2_rdv, t3_rdv). The three formations must start synchronized within a tolerance of 0.5.

Segment seg_std_groupsync_003 uses actors fleet_1, fleet_4 and fleet_8. Each performs rendezvous at point_s3 (tasks t1_rdv, t2_rdv, t3_rdv) by a deadline of 8.0. The three formations must start synchronized within a tolerance of 0.5.

Segment seg_std_cond_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on target_c1 as t1_recon. Once target_c1 is confirmed, fleet_1 performs strike on target_c1 as t2_strike. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon to t2_strike gated on target_c1_confirmed.

Segment seg_std_cond_002 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 performs reconnaissance on target_c2 as t1_recon. Once target_c2 is confirmed, fleet_4 performs strike on target_c2 as t2_strike. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon to t2_strike gated on target_c2_confirmed.

Segment seg_std_cond_003 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_c3 as t1_recon. Once target_c3 is confirmed, fleet_8 performs strike on target_c3 as t2_strike, then strike on target_d3 as t3_strike. Add a condition_trigger from t1_recon to t2_strike gated on target_c3_confirmed and a sequence from t2_strike to t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_cond_004 uses actor fleet_12. fleet_12 performs reconnaissance on site_c4 as t1_recon. Once emitter_c4 is detected, fleet_12 performs jam on site_c4 as t2_jam. Add a condition_trigger dependency from t1_recon to t2_jam gated on emitter_c4_detected.

Segment seg_std_resource_unsat_001 uses actor fleet_9. fleet_9 strikes target_r1, then target_r2, then target_r3 in sequence (tasks t1_strike, t2_strike, t3_strike). fleet_9 carries enough ammunition for only two strikes.

Segment seg_std_resource_unsat_002 uses actor fleet_4. fleet_4 strikes target_r4 as t1, target_r5 as t2, target_r6 as t3, target_r7 as t4, target_r8 as t5, then target_r9 as t6 in sequence. fleet_4 cannot carry ammunition for six strikes.

Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_001 uses actor fleet_1. fleet_1 performs reconnaissance on area_d1 as t1_recon, then strike on target_d1 as t2_strike. Add a sequence dependency t1_recon->t2_strike and a deadline of 3.0 for t2_strike.
Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_002 uses actor fleet_2. fleet_2 strikes target_d2, target_e2, then target_f2 in sequence (t1, t2, t3). Add a deadline of 4.0 for t3.
Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_003 uses actor fleet_3. fleet_3 jams site_d3 as t1_jam, then jams site_e3 as t2_jam. Add a sequence dependency t1_jam->t2_jam and a deadline of 5.0 for t2_jam.

Segment seg_std_deadline_unsat_004 uses actor fleet_8. fleet_8 performs reconnaissance on area_d4 as t1_recon, strike on target_d4 as t2_strike, then strike on target_e4 as t3_strike. Chain them with sequence dependencies and add a deadline of 4.0 for t3_strike.

Segment seg_std_physical_001 uses actor fleet_7. fleet_7 performs fly_to on hq_ph1 as t1_flyto, then reconnaissance on hq_ph1 as t2_recon. The flight from hq_base to hq_ph1 covers 10.0 km at 70.0 km/h. Add a sequence dependency from t1_flyto to t2_recon.
